# Hi there 👋🏼

DevOps / Platform Engineering — Suisse (Genève/Vaud)

## Facts
- Focus: Infrastructure automation, platform reliability, reproducible delivery
- Domains: IT Infrastructure, DevOps, Platform Engineering
- Location: Switzerland (Geneva/Vaud area)
- Languages: FR (primary), EN

## Current Focus
- AWX / AAP credentials plugins, inter-plugin interop
- Event-Driven Ansible + XL Release: job triggers via message bus
- Performance troubleshooting: Apriso Job Executor (.NET Framework 4.8)
- Proxmox homelab for fast test environment iteration
